name: Fixed Bank QAT + XSA5 + Label Smoothing + TTT Tuning
blurb: Fixed broken QAT for bank parameters via STE int6 fake-quantization with torch.compile recompilation, expanded XSA to 5 layers, added label smoothing 0.05, tuned TTT LR/momentum. Non-record experimental submission exploring QAT fix and hyperparameter changes. Built on LeakyReLU + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon stack.
author: suchitjain
